allow: Bash(cd "/Users/Editor-Benny/Documents/BennyOS" && echo "=== BennyOS images \(excl node_modules\) ==="; find . -path ./node_modules -prune -o \\\( -iname '*.png' -o -iname '*.svg' -o -iname '*.jpg' -o -iname '*.jpeg' -o -iname '*.webp' -o -iname '*.avif' \\\) -print 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules; echo "=== ~/Downloads recent images \(last 2 days\) ==="; find ~/Downloads -maxdepth 1 -mtime -2 \\\( -iname '*.png' -o -iname '*.svg' -o -iname '*.jpg' -o -iname '*.jpeg' -o -iname '*.webp' \\\) 2>/dev/null | head -40; echo "=== ~/Desktop recent images \(last 2 days\) ==="; find ~/Desktop -maxdepth 2 -mtime -2 \\\( -iname '*.png' -o -iname '*.svg' -o -iname '*.jpg' -o -iname '*.jpeg' -o -iname '*.webp' \\\) 2>/dev/null | head -40)
